subject: Fina, a young female mage figure in white and purple layered dress with a bow, light hair adorned with a bow accessory
description: A young female figure stands in a composed pose wearing a layered outfit of white, purple, and green — a fitted top with a layered skirt and a flowing white cape or mantle. Her hair is light and adorned with a prominent bow accessory. She holds what appears to be a bow weapon at her side, the curve of it visible in the lower right. Her expression is calm and gentle. The background shows a large soft-focus duplicate of the same figure — the standard FFTCG dual-image layout. The overall palette is soft and light with cool greens and pinks.
foreground: young female figure in white-purple layered dress with bow accessory, holding a bow, gentle expression
background: soft-focus large portrait of same figure, light tones
